metadata.title: Nvidia sales are 'off the charts,' but Google, Amazon and others now make their own custom AI chips
metadata.description: Nvidia is king in AI chips, but custom ASICs are gaining ground with Google, Amazon, Meta, Microsoft and OpenAI now making their own.
metadata.author: Katie Tarasov
metadata.keywords: Amazon.com Inc,Alphabet Class A,NVIDIA Corp,Alphabet Class A,Amazon.com Inc,NVIDIA Corp,Tesla Inc,CoreWeave Inc,Oracle Corp,Advanced Micro Devices Inc,Video First,Semiconductor device manufacturing,ByteDance,Jensen Huang,Breaking News: Technology,Meta Platforms Inc,Qualcomm Inc,NXP Semiconductors NV,Marvell Technology Inc,Broadcom Inc,Intel Corp,Apple Inc,Microsoft Corp,Alibaba Group Holding Ltd,Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co Ltd,Technology,Sam Altman,business news
